text:
Sensor technologies are likely to emerge as a key technological component for realising the Internet of Things (IoT). The numbers tell us that sensors have been deployed worldwide during the last decade in a pretty consistent fashion, and their growth rates are accelerating. Even though one might argue about the significance of a sensor, their sheer number implies an unimaginable amount of data sources with more being added each day. Unfortunately, these data points are blind without some kind of interpretation attached to them. In order to capitalise on their potential it is imperative to learn how to collect, transform, process and disseminate the context – meaning the meaningful information - that describe the situations in which they are deployed. The fact is that context aware computing is one approach that makes the full potential of our sensor-based world to become real.

Context awareness is a milestone in human-computer interaction. With the rapid development of the Internet of Things (IoT), awareness of the context behind objects and people becomes a new focus. First, this paper introduces the basic information about IoT and the basic characteristics of context-aware system. Then the context life cycle is deeply analyzed and the flow of data in the cycle is introduced. Finally, through an original taxonomy, 50 context-aware IoT projects completed by various organizations during the last decade (2001–2011) are comparatively analyzed, and based on the research achievements and phenomena in these achievements, some meaningful experiences are summarized, and corresponding research orientations are proposed. The purpose of this paper is to provide a comprehensive survey of the context-awareness for IoT. In the paper, the basic concepts of IoT and context-aware system are introduced; the context life cycle is deeply analyzed, and the circulating data process in the cycle is further introduced. Then an original taxonomy is proposed to summarize and compare several context-aware IoT projects, including those of academic institutions, enterprises, etc. completed by 50 individuals during the last decade (2001–2011), so as to summarize the relevant experiences and seek the development orientations in the future research work. The overall purpose of this paper is to summarize the accomplishments of the context-awareness research based on IoT in terms of achievements and applications, in order to seek for a reference for the future developments of related technologies, and meanwhile to evaluate the feasibility of the mature research results for the development of the IoT technology.
